h1: Kitchen Remodeling Services in Dunedin, FL
intro: Transform your kitchen with Titan Homes Group's expert kitchen remodeling services in Dunedin, FL. Our licensed team designs and builds stunning, functional kitchens tailored to your lifestyle and budget.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group delivers world-class kitchen remodeling services to homeowners throughout Dunedin, FL. Whether you envision an open-concept cooking space, a chef-inspired layout, or a complete luxury kitchen transformation, our experienced team brings your vision to life with exceptional craftsmanship.

Our Dunedin kitchen remodeling services cover every aspect of your project — from initial design consultation and 3D concept renderings to full installation. We source premium cabinetry, countertops, flooring, and fixtures, and our licensed contractors handle all plumbing and electrical work required during the remodel.

Homeowners in Dunedin choose Titan Homes Group because we offer:

Transparent pricing with no hidden fees, a detailed project timeline, and regular progress updates. We work with budgets ranging from $20,000 for a focused refresh to $50,000+ for high-end custom builds. Financing options are available to make your Dunedin kitchen remodel financially accessible.

Our satisfaction guarantee means we don't ask for final payment until you are 100% satisfied — that's our promise to every Dunedin homeowner.

faqs.question: How much does kitchen remodeling cost in Dunedin, FL?
faqs.answer: Kitchen remodeling in Dunedin typically ranges from $20,000 for a targeted refresh to $50,000+ for a full luxury build. Factors include kitchen size, cabinet quality, countertop material, and scope of plumbing and electrical work. We provide detailed quotes after a free in-home consultation.

faqs.question: How long does a kitchen remodel take in Dunedin?
faqs.answer: Most kitchen remodels in Dunedin take 4–12 weeks depending on scope. A cosmetic update might complete in 4–6 weeks, while a full gut renovation can take 8–12 weeks. We provide a detailed schedule at the start of every project.

faqs.question: Do you offer kitchen design services in Dunedin?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our in-house designer creates floor plans, assists with cabinet and countertop selection, and produces 3D concept renderings specifically for your Dunedin home. All design services are included in our project proposals.

faqs.question: Is financing available for kitchen remodeling in Dunedin?
faqs.answer: Yes! Titan Homes Group offers flexible financing options for Dunedin homeowners. Ask about our low monthly payment plans during your free consultation.
